author: Mark Atwood
text: Needs human decision: (1) Add golden-vector test — requires real TPM or swtpm to generate reference DER. (2) Switch to RustCrypto der/spki crate — larger change, better ecosystem alignment but different dep tree. (3) Accept the risk and document it — picky-asn1-der 0.5 is stable and DER encoding is canonical by spec. Recommend option 3 with a comment noting the dependency, defer golden-vector test until swtpm integration harness exists.
